items.claim: Cortez is a headcase and her focus on her career is questionable.
items.quote: Cortez strikes me as a bit of a headcase. Not a bit, a lot of bit... it seems like Cortez doesn't care. It seems like she doesn't really care about her career.

items.claim: Cortez is on the back end of her career.
items.quote: It's like maybe Cortez is on the back end of her career

items.claim: Wang Kong showed some of the worst submission defense in her fight against Mara.
items.quote: she showed some of the worst submission defense I've ever seen in my entire life.

items.claim: Wang Kong is at an advanced age to be learning new skills.
items.quote: That's kind of an advanced age to be learning stuff like that.

items.claim: Damian Pinas is 14 years younger than Cesar Almeida.
items.quote: That makes him 14 years younger than Almeida who's 38.

items.claim: Damian Pinas has a five and a half inch reach advantage over Cesar Almeida.
items.quote: And he's also got a five and a half inch reach advantage

items.claim: Damian Pinas possesses 'cheat code' level athleticism that allows for rapid skill improvement.
items.quote: what I like most about this guy is he's got that cheat code athleticism.

items.claim: Cesar Almeida is showing big signs of physical decline due to his age.
items.quote: I think already Almeida showing big signs of decline
